weapons.name: Advanced Bow
weapons.description: A bow reconstructed with advanced technology. Capable of firing extremely powerful arrows.

weapons.name: Advanced Fishing Rod (Depresso)
weapons.description: A fishing rod designed for catching Pals. It's sturdier and offers slightly better performance than Advanced Fishing Rod (Pengullet) .

weapons.name: Advanced Fishing Rod (Pengullet)
weapons.description: A fishing rod designed for catching Pals. Use it with bait near water where shadows are visible to start fishing. It boasts improved performance, making catches vastly easier.

weapons.name: Assault Rifle
weapons.description: An Assault Rifle that mows down enemies with overwhelming force. It excels at rapid-fire and is well suited to taking down powerful foes.

weapons.name: Axe4
weapons.description: Axe4 Logging Yield Up Lv. 3

weapons.name: Ballistic Shield
weapons.description: [WIP] This item is under development.

weapons.name: Bat
weapons.description: Baseball bat for close-range combat. Might be tough to get a home run with a Pal.

weapons.name: Beam Launcher
weapons.description: Fires a high-density beam that causes explosions over a wide area. Caution is required to prevent overheating during rapid fire.

weapons.name: Beam Scatter
weapons.description: A specialized beam weapon for close-range combat. It fires compressed energy in a wide, scattering blast.

weapons.name: Beam Sword
weapons.description: Beam Sword for close-range combat. Slices through opponents, burning them with a high-output laser.

weapons.name: Beegarde's Spear
weapons.description: A spear made from the Beegarde 's spear, altered for human use. Can feel a sincere loyalty.

weapons.name: Beginner Fishing Rod (Chillet)
weapons.description: A fishing rod designed for catching Pals. Use it with bait near water where shadows are visible to start fishing. Perfect for beginners and ideal for reeling in low level Pals.

weapons.name: Beginner Fishing Rod (Gumoss)
weapons.description: A fishing rod designed for catching Pals. It's sturdier and offers slightly better performance than Beginner Fishing Rod (Chillet) . Perfect for beginners and ideal for reeling in low level Pals.

weapons.name: Boost Gun
weapons.description: Firing this at a Pal in your team temporarily boosts that Pal's attack and defense. Firing it at an enemy deals damage instead.

weapons.name: CaptureRope
weapons.description: en Text

weapons.name: Charge Rifle
weapons.description: A beam rifle crafted with advanced technology. Charges energy to deliver one powerful shot.

weapons.name: Combat SMG
weapons.description: A submachine gun made from Soralite Ingots. Its improved magazine and ammunition enhance its suppression power.

weapons.name: Compound Bow
weapons.description: A modernized bow. Capable of firing more powerful arrows.

weapons.name: Core Eject Shotgun
weapons.description: [ULTRAKILL Collab] A shotgun powered by heat, capable of firing endlessly. When equipped, throwing a Pal Sphere is replaced with Core Eject. Hold to charge and extend its range. Cores hit by shots from Marksman Revolver will explode.

weapons.name: Crossbow
weapons.description: Fires an Arrow effortlessly. Though it takes time to load, it delivers a powerful shot.

weapons.name: Dark Grenade
weapons.description: A Dark Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Dark damage to enemies.

weapons.name: Decal Gun 1
weapons.description: Strange gun that paints a picture of Cattiva where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

weapons.name: Decal Gun 2
weapons.description: Strange gun that paints a picture of Lamball where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

weapons.name: Decal Gun 3
weapons.description: Strange gun that paints a picture of Melpaca where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

weapons.name: Decal Gun 4
weapons.description: Strange gun that paints a picture of Anubis where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

weapons.name: Decal Gun 5
weapons.description: Strange gun that paints a picture of Relaxaurus where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

weapons.name: Double-Barreled Shotgun
weapons.description: Wreaks havoc at close range. Can fire twice before reloading. Despite the limited load capacity, it still packs a punch.

weapons.name: Dragon Grenade
weapons.description: A Dragon Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Dragon damage to enemies.

weapons.name: Drone Launcher
weapons.description: A launcher that fires drones which perform autonomous attacks. Capable of deploying up to 9 units, enabling sustained suppression.

weapons.name: Elizabee's Staff
weapons.description: A spear made from Elizabee 's staff, altered for human use. It is imbued with Elizabee 's indomitable spirit.

weapons.name: Energy Shotgun
weapons.description: A shotgun that fires energy rounds. Excelling in rapid fire, its close-range firepower is truly otherworldly.

weapons.name: Enhanced Lily's Spear
weapons.description: An enhanced version of Lily's beloved spear. Pierces those who neglect their Pals.

weapons.name: Excalibur
weapons.description: [Tides of Terraria] A sacred sword that gleams with golden light. Swinging it unleashes shockwaves around you.

weapons.name: Fire Arrow Crossbow
weapons.description: A Crossbow that deals Fire damage. Burns Pals with fire arrows, making them easier to capture. Requires Fire Arrow .

weapons.name: Fire Bow
weapons.description: A bow that deals Fire damage. Burns Pals with fire arrows, making them easier to capture. Requires Fire Arrow .

weapons.name: Fishing Rod_Good
weapons.description: Fishing Rod_Good

weapons.name: Fishing Rod_Legendary
weapons.description: Fishing Rod_Legendary

weapons.name: Fishing Rod_Old
weapons.description: Fishing Rod_Old

weapons.name: Fishing Rod_Super
weapons.description: Fishing Rod_Super

weapons.name: Five Shot Bow
weapons.description: An enhanced bow that allows five arrows to be fired simultaneously. By some strange mechanism, it only consumes a single Arrow when fired.

weapons.name: Flamethrower
weapons.description: Flamethrower that fires long-range flame. Can set the enemy on fire.

weapons.name: Frag Grenade
weapons.description: A Frag Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing damage to enemies.

weapons.name: Frag Grenade Mk2
weapons.description: An improved frag grenade. It explodes a few seconds after being thrown, dealing massive damage to enemies.

weapons.name: Gatling Gun
weapons.description: A Gatling Gun capable of rapid fire. Mows down enemies with suppressive fire.

weapons.name: Giga Grappling Gun
weapons.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. Using data from prototype versions, its capabilities have been further increased.

weapons.name: Grappling Gun
weapons.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. It allows for easy movement between places with varying elevation.

weapons.name: Grass Grenade
weapons.description: A Grass Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Grass damage to enemies.

weapons.name: Grenade Launcher
weapons.description: Fires grenades that cause wide-ranging explosions. Useful when dealing with a large number of enemies.

weapons.name: Ground Grenade
weapons.description: A Ground Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Ground damage to enemies.

weapons.name: Guided Missile Launcher
weapons.description: Fires missiles that automatically track and pursue enemies. Missiles explode upon impact, causing damage over a wide area.

weapons.name: Hand-Held Torch
weapons.description: Lights up dark areas and keeps you warm. Can also be used for close range combat in a pinch.

weapons.name: Handgun
weapons.description: A handgun with improved capacity and rapid-fire capabilities. Has more immediate firepower than a Makeshift Handgun .

weapons.name: Heavy Assault Rifle
weapons.description: An assault rifle made from Soralite Ingots. It has been enhanced to handle powerful ammo while maintaining its versatility.

weapons.name: Homing Sphere Launcher
weapons.description: A launcher for firing spheres. Fired spheres home in on Pals.

weapons.name: Hyper Grappling Gun
weapons.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. As a result of research, it has achieved overwhelming mobility.

weapons.name: Ice Grenade
weapons.description: A Ice Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, freezing the surrounding area.

weapons.name: Incendiary Grenade
weapons.description: A Incendiary Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, setting the surrounding area on fire.

weapons.name: Intermediate Fishing Rod (Cattiva)
weapons.description: A fishing rod designed for catching Pals. Use it with bait near water where shadows are visible to start fishing. It boasts improved performance, making catches a bit easier.

weapons.name: Intermediate Fishing Rod (Croajiro)
weapons.description: A fishing rod designed for catching Pals. It's sturdier and offers slightly better performance than Intermediate Fishing Rod (Cattiva) .

weapons.name: Katana
weapons.description: Katana for close-range combat. Slices through with razor-sharp precision, cutting cleanly in one strike.

weapons.name: Laser Gatling Gun
weapons.description: Fires beam-like energy blasts at high speed. Its overwhelming firepower can take down multiple enemies at once.

weapons.name: Laser Rifle
weapons.description: A weapon that fires high-energy lasers. It has impressive firepower and is easy to handle.

weapons.name: Laser Sword
weapons.description: A Beam Sword made from Soralite Ingots. A close-range weapon that instantly cuts targets using its high-output energy blade.

weapons.name: Launcher_Meat
weapons.description: en Text

weapons.name: Legendary Meowmere
weapons.description: [Tides of Terraria] A legendary Meowmere forged from Luminite Bar . Swinging it launches cat projectiles that ricochet and attack foes.

weapons.name: Lily's Spear
weapons.description: The spear cherished by Lily. Punishes those who neglect their Pals.

weapons.name: Makeshift Assault Rifle
weapons.description: An assault rifle handmade from scraps. It excels in rate of fire and long range, but its single-shot power is low.

weapons.name: Makeshift Handgun
weapons.description: A handgun created from spare parts. Relatively well suited for close-quarters combat, but fires only one shot at a time.

weapons.name: Makeshift Shotgun
weapons.description: A shotgun handmade from scraps. It has a short range but excels in close-range combat

weapons.name: Makeshift SMG
weapons.description: A submachine gun handmade from scraps. It excels in rate of fire, but its single-shot power is low.

weapons.name: Marksman Revolver
weapons.description: [ULTRAKILL Collab] An electrically powered revolver capable of firing endlessly. When equipped, Pal Sphere throws are replaced with Coin Toss. Hitting a coin with the Marksman Revolver causes the bullet to ricochet toward enemies.

weapons.name: Meat Cleaver
weapons.description: Knife for butchering Pals. When equipped, the Pet command becomes Butcher. Butchered Pals will be gone for good.

weapons.name: Mechanical Bow
weapons.description: A bow crafted from Soralite Ingots. With greatly enhanced initial velocity and piercing power, this high-precision weapon excels at ranged combat.

weapons.name: Mega Grappling Gun
weapons.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. Since it's upgraded, it now has greater range.

weapons.name: Megaboost Gun
weapons.description: Firing it at an allied Pal boosts their attack and defense, while hitting an enemy deals damage. Thanks to improvements, the boost is stronger and lasts longer, and it deals more damage to enemies.

weapons.name: Meowmere
weapons.description: [Tides of Terraria] According to the legend, this sword was brought back from a distant land by Croajiro . Why? We have no idea... Fires a bouncing cat projectile with each swing to attack enemies.

weapons.name: Metal Axe
weapons.description: An axe for cutting wood. Made from metal, it chops through Hardwood with ease, making it useful for harvesting sturdy trees that grow deep within the continent. Logging Yield Up Lv. 1

weapons.name: Metal Bat
weapons.description: A Metal Bat that works well in close combat. Use it to beat down anyone you don't like.

weapons.name: Metal Detector
weapons.description: Using this reveals hidden Chromite deposits in dungeons, marking them for easier mining. Deposits will become unmarked if you move too far away.

weapons.name: Metal Pickaxe
weapons.description: A pickaxe used for mining. Made from metal, its durability and efficiency have improved. Mining Yield Up Lv. 1

weapons.name: Metal Spear
weapons.description: Useful for close-range combat. The metal tip give it an increased attack power. Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

weapons.name: Meteor Launcher
weapons.description: A phenomenal weapon that fires a meteor. Upon striking its target, it creates an explosion similar to a meteorite impact.

weapons.name: Multi Guided Missile Launcher
weapons.description: A missile launcher that can hold multiple ammo at once. Fires a series of missiles that automatically track and follow enemies.

weapons.name: Musket
weapons.description: Simple, old fashioned gun. Fires a single, powerful shot at the expense of a long reload time.

weapons.name: Nightglow
weapons.description: [Tides of Terraria] A lantern that radiates a rainbow-hued light. Holding it aloft releases homing light projectiles that strike enemies multiple times.

weapons.name: Old Bow
weapons.description: Primitive long range weapon. Hastily put together, it isn't very powerful.

weapons.name: Old Revolver
weapons.description: A slightly outdated revolving handgun. Compared to Handgun , it excels in single-shot power.

weapons.name: Overheat Rifle
weapons.description: An assault rifle capable of firing endlessly without reloading. Prolonged bursts cause overheating, leaving you exposed. Use with caution.

weapons.name: Pal Metal Axe
weapons.description: An axe for chopping wood. It has achieved extraordinary sharpness thanks to Pal Metal. It can slice through high-grade trees from the harshest regions without trouble. Logging Yield Up Lv. 4

weapons.name: Pal Metal Pickaxe
weapons.description: A pickaxe for mining. It has achieved extraordinary efficiency thanks to Pal Metal. Mining Yield Up Lv. 4

weapons.name: Pal Recovery Grenade
weapons.description: A Frag Grenade with healing effects. It bursts on impact, restoring HP to allied Pals.

weapons.name: PenguinLauncher
weapons.description: en Text

weapons.name: Pickaxe_Tier_03
weapons.description: en Text Mining Yield Up Lv. 3

weapons.name: Plasma Cannon
weapons.description: Fires high-output energy projectiles. Causes an energy explosion upon impact.

weapons.name: Plasma Multicutter
weapons.description: A portable plasma cutter that concentrates and emits plasma energy. It supports a wide range of uses, from ore excavation to tree cutting. Its high-output energy also allows for the mining of special ores. Logging/Mining Yield Up

weapons.name: Plasma Rifle
weapons.description: A rifle that releases an electrical discharge from the point of impact, which chains to multiple enemies.

weapons.name: Poison Arrow Crossbow
weapons.description: A Crossbow that inflicts poison on its target. Poisoned Pals are easier to capture. Requires Poison Arrow .

weapons.name: Poison Bow
weapons.description: Frightening bow that poisons its target. Poisoned Pals are easier to capture. Requires Poison Arrow .

weapons.name: Primitive Sword
weapons.description: A sword for close-range combat. Not bad for a battered sword. Perfect for getting up close and personal.

weapons.name: Prototype Shotgun
weapons.description: A shotgun made from Soralite Ingots. It delivers overwhelming firepower at close range, and its special magazine also provides high sustained combat capability.

weapons.name: Pump-Action Shotgun
weapons.description: A high capacity, powerful shotgun. It has outstanding close range DPS.

weapons.name: RecurveBow
weapons.description: en Text

weapons.name: Refined Metal Axe
weapons.description: An axe for cutting wood. Made from high quality metal, its sharpness and durability has improved even further. It can harvest Hardwood from sturdy trees that grow in unforgiving lands. Logging Yield Up Lv. 2

weapons.name: Refined Metal Pickaxe
weapons.description: A pickaxe used for mining. Its durability and efficiency have further improved. Mining Yield Up Lv. 2

weapons.name: Refined Metal Spear
weapons.description: Useful for close-range combat. The high-quality metal tip give it an increased attack power. Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

weapons.name: Rocket Launcher
weapons.description: A Rocket Launcher that can fire a powerful round from long distances.

weapons.name: Scatter Sphere Launcher
weapons.description: A new type of launcher that fires a large number of spheres. It can easily capture a herd of Pals.

weapons.name: Semi-Auto Rifle
weapons.description: A rifle that allows for a certain degree of rapid fire. It’s easy to aim and has high firepower, making it effective for mid-range combat.

weapons.name: Semi-Auto Shotgun
weapons.description: A rapid-fire shotgun with immense power. Its close-range damage output is top-notch.

weapons.name: Shock Grenade
weapons.description: A Shock Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, electrocuting everything in the blast radius.

weapons.name: Single-Shot Rifle
weapons.description: A single-shot rifle. Takes time to load. What it lacks in capacity, it makes up for with sheer power.

weapons.name: Single-Shot Sphere Launcher
weapons.description: A launcher that fires spheres. It can capture Pals from a greater distance.

weapons.name: SMG
weapons.description: A submachine gun with exceptional rate of fire. It’s easy to handle and effective in close-range combat.

weapons.name: SniperRifle_Default
weapons.description: en Text

weapons.name: Stone Axe
weapons.description: An axe for cutting wood. Made from stone, it's not very sharp.

weapons.name: Stone Pickaxe
weapons.description: A pickaxe used for mining. Made from stone, the efficiency is questionable.

weapons.name: Stone Spear
weapons.description: Useful for close-range combat. Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

weapons.name: Stun Baton
weapons.description: Close range weapon that sends out an electric jolt upon contact. Pals are easier to capture when electrocuted.

weapons.name: Sword
weapons.description: Sword for close-range combat. The blade is extremely sharp! Mightier than a pen, for sure. Requires Weapon Workbench to craft.

weapons.name: Tactical Grenade Launcher
weapons.description: A grenade launcher made from Soralite Ingots. Improved trajectory stability allows for precise long-range bombings.

weapons.name: Terra Blade
weapons.description: [Tides of Terraria] This curious sword releases vibrant green shockwaves with each strike, allowing you to hit enemies from afar despite being a melee weapon.

weapons.name: Terraprisma
weapons.description: [Tides of Terraria] A mystical sword with a rainbow-colored blade. Wielding it lets you summon up to nine blessed swords to fight alongside you.

weapons.name: Three Shot Bow
weapons.description: An enhanced bow that allows three arrows to be fired simultaneously. By some strange mechanism, it only consumes a single Arrow when fired.

weapons.name: ThrowStone
weapons.description: en Text

weapons.name: Ultra Grappling Gun
weapons.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. With new materials, cooldown time has been significantly reduced.

weapons.name: Vortex Beater
weapons.description: [Tides of Terraria] A powerful gun fueled by unknown energy. Fires homing missiles at regular intervals that track enemies and explode on impact. Has a 66% chance to not consume ammo when firing.

weapons.name: Water Grenade
weapons.description: A Water Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Water damage to enemies.

weapons.name: Wooden Club
weapons.description: A Wooden Club for close range combat. Can beat a small Pal to a pulp if need be.
